# init()

**Initializer**

Creates an empty credential session.

## Declaration

```swift
init()
```

## Discussion

Don’t use this initializer to create a session. Use [doc://SecureElementCredential/documentation/SecureElementCredential/CredentialSession/startSession()] to request and start a session.
title: init()
